title.en: China-to-Mozambique Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入莫桑比克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入莫三比克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Mozambique INNOQ conformity and NM/IEC standards adoption, ARENE licensing, EDM grid-connection acceptance, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, 220/380 V 50 Hz grid settings, and lender IEC-referenced specifications for donor, IPP, mini-grid, mining, and gas-sector projects — versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与莫桑比克INNOQ合格评定及NM/IEC标准采纳、ARENE许可、EDM并网接受、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据、220/380 V 50 Hz电网参数，以及捐助方、IPP、微电网、矿业和天然气项目中贷款方引用IEC的规格——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與莫三比克INNOQ合格評定及NM/IEC標準採納、ARENE許可、EDM併網接受、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據、220/380 V 50 Hz電網參數，以及捐助方、IPP、微電網、礦業和天然氣項目中貸款方引用IEC的規格——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INNOQ conformity determination, ARENE licensing decision, EDM grid-connection approval, customs determination, lender technical acceptance, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, EPC contractors, and installers should verify current Mozambique NM standards, INNOQ conformity and import certification requirements, ARENE licensing rules, EDM connection conditions, customs procedures, and project-owner or lender specifications with qualified professionals before shipment, commissioning, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INNOQ合格评定裁定、ARENE许可决定、EDM并网批准、海关裁定、贷款方技术接受或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、EPC承包商和安装方在出货、调试或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行莫桑比克NM标准、INNOQ合格评定和进口认证要求、ARENE许可规则、EDM接入条件、海关程序及项目业主或贷款方规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INNOQ合格評定裁定、ARENE許可決定、EDM併網批准、海關裁定、貸款方技術接受或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、EPC承包商和安裝方在出貨、調試或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行莫三比克NM標準、INNOQ合格評定和進口認證要求、ARENE許可規則、EDM接入條件、海關程序及項目業主或貸款方規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Mozambique, the key practical gaps are: (1) INNOQ conformity and import certification against Mozambique NM standards and adopted IEC evidence; (2) ARENE licensing for grid-connected, mini-grid, IPP, or regulated electricity activities; (3) EDM connection approval and protection-setting acceptance for the 220/380 V, 50 Hz network; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, and IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC test evidence; and (5) lender or donor specifications for financed solar, rural electrification, mining, and gas-sector projects. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence should not be treated as automatically accepted in Mozambique without INNOQ, ARENE, EDM, and project-owner confirmation.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口莫桑比克时，主要实际差距包括：（1）依据莫桑比克NM标准及采纳IEC证据的INNOQ合格评定和进口认证；（2）并网、微电网、IPP或受监管电力活动所需的ARENE许可；（3）EDM对220/380 V、50 Hz电网的接入批准和保护整定接受；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口及IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC测试证据；（5）融资太阳能、农村电气化、矿业和天然气项目的贷款方或捐助方规格。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据不应在未获INNOQ、ARENE、EDM及项目业主确认前，被视为在莫桑比克自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口莫三比克時，主要實際差距包括：（1）依據莫三比克NM標準及採納IEC證據的INNOQ合格評定和進口認證；（2）併網、微電網、IPP或受監管電力活動所需的ARENE許可；（3）EDM對220/380 V、50 Hz電網的接入批准和保護整定接受；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面及IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC測試證據；（5）融資太陽能、農村電氣化、礦業和天然氣項目的貸款方或捐助方規格。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據不應在未獲INNOQ、ARENE、EDM及項目業主確認前，被視為在莫三比克自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
